mapper.sql: quote_id, quote_type, currency_pair, base_currency, quote_currency, term, maturity_date, market_mid_rate, total_buy_rate, total_sell_rate, branch_customer_buy_rate, branch_customer_sell_rate, forward_point, swap_point, status, effective_time, published_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_quote WHERE quote_type = #{quoteType} AND currency_pair = #{currencyPair} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM fx_quote ORDER BY quote_type, currency_pair

SELECT FROM fx_quote WHERE quote_type = #{quoteType} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY currency_pair, CASE term WHEN '1D' THEN 1 WHEN 'SW' THEN 2 WHEN '1M' THEN 3 WHEN '3M' THEN 4 WHEN '6M' THEN 5 WHEN '1Y' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_quote (quote_type, currency_pair, base_currency, quote_currency, term, maturity_date, market_mid_rate, total_buy_rate, total_sell_rate, branch_customer_buy_rate, branch_customer_sell_rate, forward_point, swap_point, status, effective_time, published_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{quoteType}, #{currencyPair}, #{baseCurrency}, #{quoteCurrency}, #{term}, #{maturityDate}, #{marketMidRate}, #{totalBuyRate}, #{totalSellRate}, #{branchCustomerBuyRate}, #{branchCustomerSellRate}, #{forwardPoint}, #{swapPoint}, #{status}, #{effectiveTime}, #{publishedBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_quote SET quote_type = #{quoteType}, currency_pair = #{currencyPair}, base_currency = #{baseCurrency}, quote_currency = #{quoteCurrency}, term = #{term}, maturity_date = #{maturityDate}, market_mid_rate = #{marketMidRate}, total_buy_rate = #{totalBuyRate}, total_sell_rate = #{totalSellRate}, branch_customer_buy_rate = #{branchCustomerBuyRate}, branch_customer_sell_rate = #{branchCustomerSellRate}, forward_point = #{forwardPoint}, swap_point = #{swapPoint}, status = #{status}, effective_time = #{effectiveTime}, published_by = #{publishedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE quote_id = #{quoteId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_quote WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY quote_type, currency_pair
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_quote SET status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM fx_quote WHERE created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_quote WHERE quote_type = #{quoteType} AND currency_pair = #{currencyPair} AND market_mid_rate IS NOT NULL AND effective_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY effective_time ASC
